intentSynonyms: get a file content in bitbucket
look up a file content in bitbucket
fetch a single file content in bitbucket
view one specific file content in bitbucket
read a file from a repository in bitbucket
description: Read the raw content of a file from a Bitbucket repository at a given branch, tag, or commit.

path.description: File path relative to repository root

ref.description: Branch name, tag, or commit SHA — defaults to the repository default branch
